name: law firm partners processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For law firm partners processing 5–15 invoices/month, inefficient client engagement tracking causes missed billing opportunities. We provide automated reporting instead of manual tracking and reporting through spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inability to track client engagement effectively leads to missed billing opportunities.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inability to track client engagement effectively leads to missed billing opportunities.
